---
title: "Week 1: Cohort Assembly"
author: "Eric Xie"
format: html
---

## 2.3.4 Building the first AI-READI cohort table

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

participants <- read_tsv("data/participants.tsv")

cohort_table <- participants %>%
  transmute(
    person_id = person_id,
    age = age,
    study_group = study_group,
    clinical_site = clinical_site,
    recommended_split = recommended_split,
    cgm_availability = wearable_blood_glucose,
    wearable_availability = wearable_activity_monitor,
    clinical_data_availability = clinical_data,
    average_cgm_glucose = NA_real_,
    average_daily_steps = NA_real_
  )

knitr::kable(cohort_table)
```
